question:
Will Toulouse FC win on 2025-11-29?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for November 29, 2025
If Toulouse FC wins, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve "No".
This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

Resolution source: https://www.ligue1.com/

evidences.title: PSG vs. Toulouse: Injury, Suspension List & Predicted XIs - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: # Toulouse With the Same Starting XI as Against Marseille? On Toulouse's side, Carles Martinez Novell will be without suspended Argentine winger Santiago Hidalgo, as well as English center back Charlie Cresswell, out with a hamstring injury, and Ghanaian midfielder Abu Francis, who is in the recovery phase after suffering a double tibia-fibula fracture last November. Toulouse also had two players in the United States in the early hours of Wednesday morning: American center back Mark McKenzie, who played one minute against Portugal, and Canadian center forward Jacen Russell-Rowe, who played 15 minutes against Tunisia. The former could start against Paris -- the latter probably not. [...] Previously injured players Dayann Methalie, Frank Magri, and Rafik Messali have returned to training in recent days and could make their return to the squad on Friday against PSG. Methalie even has a good chance of starting at left wing-back against PSG. If that is the case, the Toulouse starting XI could look very similar to the one that started -- and lost 1-0 -- against Marseille last month. Toulouse's predicted lineup vs. PSG: Restes; Sidibe, McKenzie, Nicolaisen; Kamanzi, Casseres, Diop, Met...

evidences.title: Prediction Toulouse vs Metz: analysis, odds and betting tips | BetMines
evidences.content: Under the guidance of Carles Martínez Novell, Toulouse have shown flashes of quality but still lack consistency. Their season record stands at 3 wins, 1 draw, and 3 defeats, averaging 1.6 goals scored and 1.7 conceded per match. Defensively, the side has struggled to maintain focus in the first half, having lost at half time in their last three Ligue 1 games and in six of their last ten home fixtures. Nevertheless, the attacking contributions of Dayann Methalie have been a bright spot. The young left wing-back has impressed both domestically and internationally, recently scoring twice and providing an assist for France’s U21 side. [...] Toulouse vs Metz prediction by BetMines: The most likely outcome is Both Teams To Score – Yes with a 55% probability. evidences.title: List of Ligue 1 records and statistics - Grokipedia
evidences.content: season with 8 consecutive wins, a pre-modern era feat that exemplified early dominance amid the league's formative years in the 1930s and 1940s, when Lille OSC secured multiple championships post-World War II. Distinguishing home and away performances, FC Nantes maintains the longest home unbeaten streak with 92 matches from June 1976 to March 1981, comprising 80 wins and 12 draws at the Stade de la Beaujoire. On the road, Paris Saint-Germain set the away unbeaten record at 39 matches from May 2023 to April 2025, with 30 wins and 9 draws, surpassing previous European top-flight benchmarks before their streak concluded. evidences.title: 2026 World Cup injuries tracker: Timber out for Netherlands - ESPN
evidences.content: Injury: Torn ankle ligaments The Crystal Palace center back tore two ligaments in his ankle, according to Palace manager Oliver Glasner, and is "50/50" to play in the UEFA Conference League final on May 27. However, a source told ESPN's Jeff Carlisle that Richards is expected to be match fit soon, and his readiness for the World Cup is not currently in doubt. Toulouse's Mark McKenzie and FC Cincinnati's Miles Robinson are behind Richards on the depth chart and would be the most likely candidates to step up if there are any setbacks. ### Image 219Wataru Endo Injury: Ruptured ankle ligaments Endo has had a season to forget. Not only did he barely see the pitch for Liverpool, but in his sole Premier League start, away to Sunderland in February, he ruptured ankle ligaments. [...] "The 24-year-old defender has not recovered sufficiently from a groin injury to take part in the World Cup in a medically responsible manner," Netherlands said in a statement. ### Image 190Xavi Simons, Netherlands Injury: Torn ACL Tottenham Hotspur's first Premier League win of 2026 -- 1-0 against Wolves at the end of April -- came at a great cost: Simons tore an ACL in the second half. evidences.title: Soccer Odds | Soccer Betting
evidences.content: ### Money Line - Match Outright - Soccer Money Lines A Money Line bet is common in soccer, with it being a bet on the winning team of a match. Generally, the odds on a Money Line bet reflect which team is viewed as the favorite and which is the underdog. As there is the possibility of a draw in soccer, it is also an option to bet on the match being a draw. You may also find that this market is referred to as '1X2'. ### Totals betting - Goals scored Totals betting in soccer is a bet on the total number of goals scored in a match. There are a number of variations on this betting market depending on the match, which include Team Total, Total - 1st Half, Total Goals Odd/Even and more. ### Handicap betting - Soccer spreads [...] ## Soccer betting Pinnacle offers the best Soccer odds and high limits for Soccer betting. ## Soccer predictions Soccer predictions are a common practice in sports betting, and Pinnacle provides a comprehensive knowledge base through its Betting Resources to enhance the proficiency of beginner, intermediate and expert sports bettors. It contains 20 teams. The season runs from August to May, and teams play each other both home and away to fulfil a total of 38 games. Ligue 1 has promotion and relegation linked to French Ligue 2, the second tier. Three teams are relegated from Ligue 1, and three teams are promoted from Ligue 2, each season. evidences.title: Announcing the 2024/25 Ligue 1 fixtures!
evidences.content: The matches of the 1st matchday of Ligue 1 (2024/25 season): Stade Brestois – Olympique de Marseille Montpellier HSC – RC Strasbourg Alsace Angers SCO – RC Lens Toulouse FC – FC Nantes AS Monaco – AS Saint-Etienne Stade de Reims – LOSC Lille AJ Auxerre – OGC Nice Havre AC – Paris Saint-Germain Stade Rennais F.C. – Olympique Lyonnais Here are the dates for the top matches and derbies for the 2024/2025 season: Matchday 5 (September 22): Olympique Lyonnais – Olympique de Marseille Matchday 9 (October 27): Olympique de Marseille – Paris Saint-Germain RC Lens – LOSC OGC Nice – AS Monaco Matchday 11 (November 10): Olympique Lyonnais – AS Saint-Etienne Matchday 12 (November 24): RC Lens – Olympique de Marseille [...] Download the complete calendar for the 2024/2025 season here Other information on the 2024/25 season calendar: No rounds will be scheduled during the week. The 15th matchday of Ligue 1, scheduled for the weekend of December 14-15, 2024, will be the last of the 2024 calendar year. The resumption at the start of 2025 will take place with the 16th day scheduled for the weekend of January 4-5, 2025. At the end of the season, as usual, the last two days of Ligue 1 (Matchday 33...
